title: Tinkers' Platinum & Tungsten
description: Re-adds platinum and tungsten parts to Tinkers' Construct compatibility.
body: **Requires Tinkers' Construct as a dependency.** Addon for Tinkers' Construct re-adding compatibility for Platinum and Tungsten as they were removed from the base mod in the Throwback Update (v3.11.0.148). Tinkers' parts made of platinum and tungsten are re-added with slight buffs to their previous version with this mod. This mod only works at/above version v3.11.0.148 as platinum and tungsten are still available in previous versions. A separate mod adding tungsten and/or platinum is still needed to acquire the corresponding materials. ![Tinkers](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1416902/description_e5a3f92e-3a1a-46c6-b1a5-25ecd4c18f98.png) Credits to Tinkers' Construct for the original implementation and textures of Platinum and Tungsten. This mod is a maintained fork of the unpublished [Tungsten and Platinum](https://github.com/SlimeKnights/TinkersConstruct/releases/tag/v3.11.0.148) lowcode mod fix on GitHub. [ReversTeam Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/TJKZgr6UDg)   Feel free to use in any modpack.
